name: viewitall-md
description: View and edit MS Word (.docx) and PDF files directly inside Obsidian.

scripts.version: node version-bump.mjs && git add manifest.json versions.json
scripts.version:patch: npm version patch --no-git-tag-version && node version-bump.mjs && git add package.json manifest.json versions.json
scripts.version:minor: npm version minor --no-git-tag-version && node version-bump.mjs && git add package.json manifest.json versions.json
scripts.version:major: npm version major --no-git-tag-version && node version-bump.mjs && git add package.json manifest.json versions.json
